content: Zip-slip path traversal affects zip/tar/rar/7z. Rust zip crate CVE-2025-29787 (symlink entries bypass canonicalization, v1.3.0-2.2.x); async-tar TARmageddon; async_zip refuses to add zip-slip protection (caller must validate). Must canonicalize each entry path and ensure it stays under target dir, reject absolute paths and .. and symlink entries. RAR: unrar uses a non-free license (cannot bundle/redistribute freely); use libarchive/unar/7z or sevenz-rust for extraction in an AppImage.
